chunks.text: JUDGMENT SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Jail Appeal.No.D-62 of 2016. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 04.01.2022 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for the appellant. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State. = * = * = * = * = * = It is stated by learned counsel for the appellant that the appellant has already served out the conviction and sentenced awarded to him by learned trial Court, therefore, under the instruction, he does not press the instant criminal jail appeal, as it has become infructuous.

Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State. = * = * = * = * = * = It is stated by learned counsel for the appellant that the appellant has already served out the conviction and sentenced awarded to him by learned trial Court, therefore, under the instruction, he does not press the instant criminal jail appeal, as it has become infructuous. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
